Purpose / Notes: Creates a new GD account. Returns 1 on success, negative codes on failure (-2 username taken, -3 email taken, etc.)
Logs in to an existing account. Returns accountID:playerID on success. GJP2 = SHA1(password + mI29fmAnxgTs)
Backs up game save data to the server. Requires authentication.
Downloads/syncs the save data from the server to the client.

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, mS (msg perm), frS (friend req perm), cS (comment perm), yt, twitter, twitch, secret
Purpose / Notes: Updates account privacy settings and linked social media handles.
Fetches profile/account-level comments for a given accountID. Paginated.
Fetches in-game comments on a specific level. Paginated.

Parameters: userID, page, mode (0=most recent, 1=most liked), secret
Purpose / Notes: Gets a user's full comment history across all levels.

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, comment (b64 encoded), chk, secret
Purpose / Notes: Posts a comment on your own profile page. Comment must be base64-encoded.

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, levelID, comment (b64), percent, chk, secret
Purpose / Notes: Posts a comment on a specific level. Percent is your completion % shown in the comment.
Deletes one of your own profile comments by commentID.
Deletes one of your own in-level comments.

Parameters: type (search mode), str (query), page, secret + optional filters
Purpose / Notes: Main level search endpoint. Supports search by name, featured, trending, hall of fame, etc. Returns pipe/colon-delimited level objects.
Downloads full level data (level string, metadata) for a specific level ID.

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, levelName, levelString, audioTrack, gameVersion, etc., secret
Purpose / Notes: Uploads or updates a level to the GD servers. Returns the level ID.
Deletes one of your own uploaded levels by levelID.
Returns the current daily or weekly level ID and the timestamp until it changes.
Returns all map packs with their level IDs and star/coin rewards.
Returns all gauntlets and their 5 level IDs.
Updates the description of one of your levels without re-uploading the full level.
Fetches the leaderboard scores for a specific level (top players, friends, etc.).
Platformer-specific level leaderboard (separate from classic levels).
Reports a level to RobTop for review/removal.

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, levelID, stars, chk, udid, uuid, rs, secret
Purpose / Notes: Submits a star rating suggestion for a level (used by moderators and players).

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, levelID, rating (1-5 demon tier), secret
Purpose / Notes: Submits a demon difficulty rating vote for a demon-rated level.

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, levelID, stars, feature, secret
Purpose / Notes: Moderator endpoint to suggest stars/feature status for a level.
Searches and retrieves user-created level lists (GD 2.2 feature).

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, listName, listDesc, listLevels, difficulty, secret
Purpose / Notes: Creates or updates a level list on the servers.
Deletes one of your own level lists.
Searches for users by username. Returns basic user info and playerID.
Returns detailed profile info for a user: stars, demons, rank, icons, social links, etc.
Returns the global or friends leaderboard.

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, stars, moons, demons, diamonds, coins, userCoins, icon data fields, secret
Purpose / Notes: Updates your stats on the server (stars, coins, icon appearance, etc.). Called by the game client after each session.
Fetches your inbox or sent messages.
Downloads the full body of a specific message.

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, toAccountID, subject (b64), body (b64), secret
Purpose / Notes: Sends a private message to another account.

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, messages (comma list of IDs), isSender, secret
Purpose / Notes: Deletes one or more messages from your inbox or sent box.
Fetches incoming or outgoing friend requests.
Sends a friend request to another user.
Accepts a pending incoming friend request.
Deletes/declines a friend request.
Marks a friend request as read.
Removes a user from your friends list.
Blocks a user so they cannot message or friend request you.
Unblocks a previously blocked user.
Returns your full friends list or blocked users list.
Returns metadata and download URL for a Newgrounds song by ID.
Returns the base CDN URL used to fetch custom song/SFX content.
Returns the top featured Newgrounds artists in GD.
Checks whether a Newgrounds song is available/usable in GD levels.
Downloads the full GD 2.2 music library index (zlib compressed, then b64). Contains all official/licensed track metadata.
Downloads the full SFX library index. Same format as musiclibrary.dat.

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, udid, uuid, rs, chk, secret
Purpose / Notes: Fetches small/large chest reward info and timers. CHK is HMAC-based — complex to generate without client.

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, udid, uuid, chk, secret
Purpose / Notes: Returns the current three daily quest/challenge objectives.
Redeems a secret reward code. Rarely used outside the game client.

Parameters: accountID, gjp2, itemID, type (1=level/2=comment/3=profile comment), like (1/0), chk, secret
Purpose / Notes: Likes or dislikes a level, level comment, or profile comment.
Returns the URL for backup/sync operations (robtopgames.org). Used before calling backupGJAccountNew or syncGJAccountNew.
Legacy save data retrieval. Mostly superseded by syncGJAccountNew.
Returns the top 1000 global leaderboard players (stars).
Requests moderator/elder mod access. Server validates eligibility — cannot be triggered externally with useful effect.
Restores purchased items (icons, etc.) after account recovery. Requires valid CHK.
JSON leaderboard of top star-count players. Updated periodically.
JSON leaderboard of top moon-count players (GD 2.2).
JSON leaderboard of top user coin collectors.
JSON leaderboard of players with the most demon completions.
JSON leaderboard of top creator points holders.
JSON data for extended icon/cosmetic info used in the web leaderboard display.
Joins a multiplayer lobby session (GD 2.2 Platformer co-op). Server-managed; limited third-party use.
Exits the current multiplayer lobby.
Uploads a comment during a multiplayer session.
